text.title: `agent-fixable` Triage Gate (Humans Pick, Agents Work) Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the task-agent-fixable-triage-gate methodology end-to-end. Decision-gates surface stops when inputs do not pass.

step.name: define-fixable-criteria
step.input: Bug or feature spec from backlog
step.action: Write a 6-bullet checklist (repro, AC, scope, dependencies, sample, owner) that defines what makes an issue agent-fixable.
step.decision-gate: If no consensus on criteria, STOP — do not label anything yet.

step.name: wire-dispatch-workflow
step.action: Install a workflow that triggers only on `issues.labeled` with the `agent-fixable` guard. Verify no other events dispatch.

step.name: split-identities
step.action: Create `triage-bot-ro` (label-write only) and ensure every coding agent identity has label-write stripped.
step.output: Policy file forbidding label writes from `*-bot$`/`agent-*` actors.

step.name: instrument-merge-rate
step.action: Emit one event per agent pickup: outcome ∈ {merged, abandoned, human-overrode}. Aggregate weekly by agent.

step.name: review-and-tighten
step.action: If merge rate < threshold, narrow the agent-fixable criteria or throttle the underperforming agent.
step.decision-gate: If no agent meets threshold after 3 weeks, ROLLBACK — agents may not be ready for this repo.
